summary: Consolidated Foreman docs into a current portable charter with gate-pipeline and Definition of Done sub-pages, updated install symlink and crew prompts, refreshed repo docs, and deleted stale files. No TypeScript logic was changed and the Foreman test suite passed.
filesChanged: install.sh - added stable foreman/charter agent-dir symlink
extensions/foreman/crew/reviewer.md - added best-effort charter-reading and cite-rule instruction
docs/architecture.md - refreshed current repo architecture and domains
README.md - refreshed Foreman docs layout and roles
howToVerify: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "charter/gate-pipeline.md" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "charter/definition-of-done.md" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "graduate it to" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/charter/gate-pipeline.md; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/charter/definition-of-done.md; test ! -e extensions/foreman/docs/PHASE2-SPEC.md; test ! -e docs/foreman-impact-probe.md; grep -qi charter extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md; grep -qi charter extensions/foreman/crew/reviewer.md; grep -q "foreman/charter" install.sh; ! grep -q PHASE2-SPEC README.md; ! git diff --name-only -- "*.ts" | grep -q .; for t in extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh; do bash "$t"; done'
raw:
## Completed
Implemented the missing docs consolidation and cleanup from the tester FAIL report. Foreman charter is now current, split into kernel + sub-pages, installed via stable agent-dir symlink, and planner/reviewer prompts read it best-effort.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md` - current kernel/index charter.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/charter/gate-pipeline.md` - new gate pipeline sub-page.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/charter/definition-of-done.md` - new strict DoD sub-page.
- `install.sh` - adds `~/.pi/agent/foreman/charter` symlink.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - best-effort charter-reading instruction.
- `extensions/foreman/crew/reviewer.md` - best-effort charter-reading + cite-rule instruction.
- `extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md` - current crew/routing/loop docs.
- `docs/architecture.md` - current repo architecture and domains.
- `README.md` - current foreman docs layout and roles.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/DASHBOARD-SPEC.md` - removed stale PHASE2 reference.
- Deleted `extensions/foreman/docs/PHASE2-SPEC.md`.
- Deleted `docs/foreman-impact-probe.md`.

## How To Verify
```bash
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "charter/gate-pipeline.md" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "charter/definition-of-done.md" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; grep -q "graduate it to" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/charter/gate-pipeline.md; test -f extensions/foreman/docs/charter/definition-of-done.md; test ! -e extensions/foreman/docs/PHASE2-SPEC.md; test ! -e docs/foreman-impact-probe.md; grep -qi charter extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md; grep -qi charter extensions/foreman/crew/reviewer.md; grep -q "foreman/charter" install.sh; ! grep -q PHASE2-SPEC README.md; ! git diff --name-only -- "*.ts" | grep -q .; for t in extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/done_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ship_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh; do bash "$t"; done'
```

## Notes
- No `.ts` files were changed.
- Structural assertions and full Foreman test suite passed.
